name: Stir-Fried Chicken and Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
Note: Chicken should be skinned, boned and cut into thin strips.
Season chicken with pepper to taste. In a large skillet, stir-fry chicken in oil until lightly browned and tender. Remove chicken from the pan and set aside. Add butter to the pan and stir-fry garlic and onion until the onion is just tender. Add zucchini, mushrooms, and carrot and stir-fry over medium heat for 3 minutes. Add chicken back into the pan and heat through. Stir in lemon peel and juice and walnut halves. Toss everything together to mix. Serve over hot rice if desired.
